info.title: Edge Background Check Connector Callback
info.description: This is the callback endpoint for background checks. This is implemented by Cornerstone, and is here as a reference.

post.summary: this is a sample endpoint to help you understand what a callback request/response looks like, this will be implemented by Edge and hosted on Edge servers

parameters.name: BackgroundCheckReport
parameters.description: the callback request to make to Edge when updating/completing a background check

CallbackData.description: callback data includes the callback URL to use as well as the required callback data marked as required

CallbackUrl.description: does not need to be included on callbacks, can be empty string or null

ApplicantRefId.description: this is the reference id that needs to be provided on callbacks to help identify applicants

ApplicantRefUserId.description: this is the userid reference that needs to be provided on callbacks

ApplicantRefOrderId.description: this is the orderid reference that needs to be provided on callbacks

ProviderReferenceId.description: some unique reference id provided by the background check provider related to the background check that was conducted

TypeOfBackgroundCheck.description: the type of background check that was conducted

OrderStatus.description: this is an enum that gets mapped, accepted values are | completed inprogress cancelled unknown

CompletionDate.description: the date that the background check was completed, format is MM-dd-yyyy, this can be used to be the updated date as well

ScreeningResult.description: the result of the background check, this can be a string that contains pass/fail and any associated score or relevant information

ReportUrl.description: this is an url that will be used by the recruiter to view the results of the background check, this is an external url hosted by the background check provider

AutoProgressEligibility.description: this is an enum that gets mapped, accepted values are | progress dispose review
